description.ko: 소리를 물리적 빛과 기하학으로 시각화하여, 오디오 주파수가 입자와 고리의 춤으로 변하는 모습을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A visualization of sound as physical light and geometry, where audio frequencies transform into a dance of particles and rings.

prompt: A cinematic high-tech visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'Sonic Resonance Core.' A minimalist spherical robot suspended in a dark studio void, surrounded by complex 3D holographic rings and fluid wave ripples that glow in #4169E1 royal blue and #FF4500 electric orange. As the core pulses, digital frequency patterns manifest as glowing #32CD32 green particles and #FFD700 gold light trails. 8k resolution, photorealistic ray tracing, featuring intricate UI elements and a sense of visual consonance where light reacts perfectly to invisible bass frequencies.
